system.description: The silver and gold cup is big enough to hold with two hands, crusted with obsidian stones. The owner puts a drop of a demon's blood in the goblet with certain other liquids, and conducts a ritual. For days afterwards (maybe longer) the owner can see anything the demon uses remote vision to view; just by watching the surface's illusory reflections.
system.additional_info: There are many legends about the creation of the goblet, and the fate of the Whisper who first energized it. Rumor suggests the Duskvol Council entrusted the goblet to a certain family for safekeeping.
